verses.text: Amau' beh tawh kizui-in Judah mite' ngah pen leitaw lamah Edom gamgi ciang hi a, leitaw lam a gamla penna munah Zin gam ciang ban hi
Leitaw lam a gamgi pen Ci Tuipi mong, leitaw lam a sun tuidawk pan kipan hi
Leitaw lam Akrabbim kahtohna-ah paikhia-in, Zin dong ban a, Kadeshbarnea leitaw lamah Hezron dung tawnin Addar ciangdong paito-in Karka lamah kihei a
Azmon ciangdong pai-in Egypt lui-ah suakkhia a, tuipi-ah a mong bei hi. Hih pen amau' leitaw lam gamgi hi ding hi
Tua ciangin nisuahna lam gamgi pen Jordan tun'na ciangdong Ci Tuipi ahi hi. Leilu lampang gamgi pen Jordan tun'na tuipi dawk panin kipan hi
Bethhoglah lamah a gamgi paito a, Betharabah leilu lampangah paisuak hi. Tua ciangin Reuben tapa Bohan' Suangpi dongah a gamgi paito-in

Akhor Kuam panin Debir-ah paito a, leilu lam manawhin, tua kuam leitaw lampangah a om, Adummim kahtohna galkhatah a om Gilgal lamah kihei hi. Tua ciangin Enshemesh luidungah gamgi pai-in Enrogel-ah tawp hi
Tua ciangin Jebus (Jerusalem a cihna) liangko leitaw lam Hinnom' tapa' kuamah gamgi paito-in, Refaim kuam leilu lam mong, nitumna lam Hinnom Kuam galkhatah a kikhung mual dawnah gamgi paito hi
Tua ciangin mual dawn panin Neftoah lui-ah gamgi kikhung a, tua panin Efron Mual khuapite-ah pai a, tua ciangin Baalah (Kiriathjearim a cihna) lamah gamgi kawi kual hi
Tua ciangin Baalah nitumna lam Seir Mual-ah gamgi kual a, tua panin paisuakin Jearim Mual (Khesalon a cihna) liangko leilu lamah pai-in, Bethshemesh-ah paisuk a, Timnah kiangah paisuak hi
Ekron leilu lam mual liangko-ah a gamgi paikhia a, tua ciangin Shikkeron-ah gamgi kawi kualin, Baalah Mual-ah paisuak a, Jabneel-ah lengkhia-in tuipi-ah a gamgi tawp hi
Tua ciangin nitumna gamgi pen Tuipi Lian dungteng ahi hi. Hih pen amau' beh tawh kizui-in Judah mite' kiimah a gamgi ahi hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Kaleb in Hebron leh Debir Zo

verses.text: Topa in Joshua tungah a thupiak bangin Jefunneh tapa Kaleb tungah amah in Judah mite lakah tanh khat Kiriatharba, Hebron a cihna, (Arba pen Anak' pa hi) pia hi
Tua lai panin Kaleb in Anak' tapa thumte Sheshai, Ahiman, leh Talmai, Anak' suanlekhakte a hawlkhia hi
Tua lai panin Debir sunga a teng mite a sim dingin amah kuanto hi. Debir pen a nidangin Kiriathsefer kici hi
Kaleb in, “Kiriathsefer vatgawpin a lazo mi tungah ka tanu Aksah a zi dingin ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Kaleb' sanggampa Kenaz' tapa Othniel in la a, amah in a zi dingin a tanu Aksah a pia hi
Tuanu ama kiangah a pai ding ciangin ama pa' tung panin lo khat a nget ding hah gen hi. A la tung panin tuanu a kum ciangin Kaleb in tuanu kiangah, “Bang ut na hi hiam?” a ci hi

Amah in, “Letsong khat hong pia in. Negeb gamah kei hong koih na hih buangin cik tuikhukte zong hong pia in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Kaleb in tuanu tungah ciktui tungnungte leh ciktui nuainungte a pia hi.
Hihte pen amau' beh tawh kizui-in Judah minamte' gamhluah ahi hi
Leitaw lam mongciik, Edom gamgi lamah Judah minamte' neih khuapite: Kabzeel, Eder, Jagur
Kinah, Dimonah, Adadah
Kadesh, Hazor, Ithnan
Zif, Telem, Bealoth
Hazorhadattah, Keriothhezron (Hazor a cihna
Amam, Shema, Moladah
Hazargaddah, Heshmon, Bethpelet
Hazarshual, Beersheba, Biziothiah
Baalah, Iim, Ezem
Eltolad, Khesil, Hormah
Ziklag, Madmannah, Sansannah
Lebaoth, Shilhim, Ain, leh Rimmon: a vekpi-in khuapi sawmnihlekua, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi
Tua ciangin lei niamna lamah Eshtaol, Zorah, Ashnah
Zanoah, Engannim, Tappuah, Enam
Jarmuth, Adullam, Sokoh, Azekah
Shaaraim, Adithaim, Gederah, leh Gederothaim: khuapi sawmleli, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi
Tua banah Zenan, Hadashah, Migdalgad
Dilean, Mizpeh, Joktheel
Lakhish, Bozkath, Eglon
Kabbon, Lahmam, Khitlish
Gederoth, Bethdagon, Naamah, leh Makkedah: khuapi sawmleguk, a khuaneute tawh zong ahi hi
Tua ciangin Libnah, Ether, Ashan
Iftah, Ashnah, Nezib
Keilah, Akzib, leh Mareshah: khuapi kua, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi
Ekron a khuapite leh a khuaneute tawh ahi hi
Ekron panin tuipi dong, Ashdod lampanga omte khempeuh a khuaneute tawh ahi hi
Ashdod, a khuapite leh a khuaneute tawh ahi hi. Gaza, a khuapite leh a khuaneute tawh ahi hi. Egypt lui leh tuipi lian a gei ciangdong tawh ahi hi
Tua ciangin mualtung gamah Shamir, Jattir, Sokoh
Dannah, Kiriathsannah (Debir a cihna
Anab, Eshtemoh, Anim
Goshen, Holon, leh Giloh: khuapi sawmlekhat, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi
Arab, Dumah, Eshan
Janim, Bethtappuah, Afekah
Humtah, Kiriatharba (Hebron a cihna), leh Zior: khuapi kua, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi
Maon, Karmel, Zif, Juttah
Jezreel, Jokdeam, Zanoah
Kain, Gibeah, leh Timnah: khuapi sawm, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi
Halhul, Bethzur, Gedor
Maarath, Bethanoth, leh Eltekon: khuapi guk, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi
Kiriathbaal (Kiriathjearim a cihna), leh Rabbah: khuapi nih, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi
Sehnel gamah Betharabah, Middin, Sekakah
Nibshan, Ci Khuapi, leh Engedi: khuapi guk, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi
Ahih hangin Judah mite in Jerusalem-a a teng Jebus mite hawlkhia zolo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tuni dongin Jebus mite pen Judah mite tawh Jerusalem-ah a tengkhawm uh hi.
